arts.ttl: Barcelona could land key transfer target for just €2 million in January
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona could secure the signature of a long-standing transfer target for a cut-price fee during the January transfer window. That’s according to Diario Sport, who point towards…

arts.ttl: Revealed: Barcelona could lose £51m summer signing for FREE in January if they can't raise the funds to keep him - having only registered the star for half of the season when he joined
arts.sum: The club continue to have financial issues off the field and are in a race against time to raise funds or risk losing the midfield star for nothing when the winter window opens in a matter of weeks time.

arts.ttl: Match Preview: Paper-Thin Borussia Dortmund Host Barcelona
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund are tied with them on points at 12 apiece in the UCL this season and both teams will be looking to guarantee knock-out football with a win. Borussia Dortmund’s defense issues now come face-to-face with Barcelona and a familiar Robert Lewandowski.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund will trust defender as ‘Lamine Yamal stopper’ vs Barcelona
arts.sum: The coaching staff at Borussia Dortmund are ready to assign the task of keeping tabs on Lamine Yamal chiefly to Ramy Bensebaini tomorrow night. That’s according to Diario Sport, who…

arts.ttl: Barcelona could welcome two players back for Leganés clash
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona could be able to call upon two fresh faces for the club’s upcoming meeting with Leganés. The pair in question? Ronald Araújo, and Ansu Fati. Both…

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Liverpool receive transfer boost in pursuit of Barcelona-linked Nico Williams?
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool reportedly receive a boost in their efforts to sign Barcelona-linked Nico Williams from Athletic Bilbao.

arts.ttl: Peña reveals ‘unstoppable’ advice Flick has given Barça ahead of Dortmund tie
arts.sum: Now he gets to play one of the biggest games of his career in front of the famous Yellow Wall, and he wants to play his part in helping Barça return to the form that saw them destroy Bayern Munich and Real Madrid earlier this season. Barcelona head into Wednesday’s monster Champions League clash against Borussia Dortmund needing another strong performance from Iñaki Peña, who had a brilliant afternoon and was the sole reason why Barça didn’t lose to Real Betis at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Tottenham have tabled an ‘important offer’ for Barcelona transfer target
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona risk missing out on a leading transfer target to Premier League outfit Tottenham Hotspur. That’s according to Diario Sport, who name Jonathan David as the player…

arts.ttl: Barca should be very happy to have De Jong - Sahin
arts.sum: Barcelona and Dortmund head into the game level on points in the standings, with Sahin insisting there is no favorite for the match. Borussia Dortmund boss Nuri Sahin has been full of praise for Barcelona midfielder Frenkie de Jong ahead of the clash between the two sides in the Champions League .

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso speaks out on future of Barcelona free agent target
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen head coach Xabi Alonso has this week spoken out on the future of key defender Jonathan Tah. This, of course, comes amid ongoing speculation linking the German international…
